research.title: Cognitive Atrophy and Systemic Collapse in AI-Dependent Software Engineering

research.title: Unifying Sparse Attention with Hierarchical Memory for Scalable Long-Context LLM Serving
research.summary: 【arXiv】Long-context LLM serving is bottlenecked by the cost of attending over ever-growing KV caches. Dynamic sparse attention promises relief by accessing only a small, query-dependent subset of the KV state per decoding step and extending the KV storage t
research.title_zh: 将稀疏注意力与分层内存统一起来，实现可扩展的长上下文LLM服务
research.summary_zh: 【arXiv】长期的LLM服务因参加不断增长的KV缓存的成本而受到瓶颈。动态稀疏注意承诺通过每个解码步骤仅访问KV状态的一个小的、依赖于查询的子集并扩展KV存储来缓解

research.title: GLM-5V-Turbo: Toward a Native Foundation Model for Multimodal Agents
research.summary: 【arXiv】We present GLM-5V-Turbo, a step toward native foundation models for multimodal agents. As foundation models are increasingly deployed in real environments, agentic capability depends not only on language reasoning, but also on the ability to perceive

models.title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
models.summary: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.
models.title_zh: 亚马逊的云业务正在飙升，其资本支出也在飙升
models.summary_zh: 该公司首席执行官表示，这家电子商务巨头从AWS赚的钱比预期的要多，但它也在花费大量资金，并将在短期内继续这样做。
models.title_en: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
models.summary_en: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.

models.title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
models.summary: The maker of Claude has received multiple pre-emptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.
models.title_zh: 资料来源： Anthropic可能以$ 900B的估值筹集新一轮$ 500B
models.summary_zh: 据知情人士透露， Claude的制造商已收到多份估值在8500亿至9000亿美元之间的先发制人要约。
models.title_en: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
models.summary_en: The maker of Claude has received multiple pre-emptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.

models.title: On the stand, Elon Musk can’t escape his own tweets
models.summary: Elon Musk took the stand for the second day for his attempt to legally dismantle OpenAI.
models.title_zh: 在展台上，伊隆·马斯克（ Elon Musk ）无法逃脱自己的推文
models.summary_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（ Elon Musk ）因试图合法拆除OpenAI而连续第二天出庭作证。
models.title_en: On the stand, Elon Musk can’t escape his own tweets
models.summary_en: Elon Musk took the stand for the second day for his attempt to legally dismantle OpenAI.

models.title: Meta is still burning money on AR/VR
models.summary: Meta is losing billions on Reality Labs each quarter, and its AI expenditures are only going to increase its spending.
models.summary_zh: Meta每个季度都在Reality Labs上亏损数十亿美元，其人工智能支出只会增加其支出。
models.title_en: Meta is still burning money on AR/VR
models.summary_en: Meta is losing billions on Reality Labs each quarter, and its AI expenditures are only going to increase its spending.
